name: Spoonbread (Mf)
recipeIngredient: In a 3-quart saucepan, heat butter over medium heat until shimmering.
Heat milk to a boil in the saucepan.
Slowly add cornmeal and stir with a wooden spoon for a few minutes or until the mixture is thick.
Remove from heat and transfer to a mixing bowl.
Beat in baking powder and baking soda.
Beat in buttermilk, scallions, and egg yolks one at a time.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cool to room temperature.
2. Whip egg whites until stiff and fold in.
3. Bake for 40 minutes or until the top is puffy.
4. Spoon out onto plates alongside salad.
5. Serve with soup of choice.
